//: Eng-review W3 T1 · Codespaces devcontainer · target <60s boot.
name: pretext-templates
//postCreate: Runs once on codespace creation. `npm ci` pulls workspace deps + puppeteer's Chromium (~280 MB); `npm test` verifies the 211-test regression gate; `astro build` prewarms the gallery so the preview server is instant. All three stay under 60s on Codespaces 4-core.
postCreateCommand: npm ci && npm test && npm run build -w @pretext-templates/gallery
//env: Nudge puppeteer to be terser in CI-ish environments. The renderer already checks CI/DOCKER_CONTAINER/GITHUB_ACTIONS.
